string.text: Combat thins the Zone faster than the engine refills it. AlifeBalance tracks deaths per (level, faction) and advances the respawn cooldown of an eligible smart on that level by a fraction of its cooldown each advance. After the configured number of advances the cooldown expires and the engine spawns one squad from the smart's own configured pool on its next alife tick. It does not spawn anything itself. Works alongside vanilla, ZCP, Redone, and any other spawner mod.
Master toggle. When off, no death tracking and no cooldown advances.

How many advances are needed to fully push a smart's respawn cooldown to its floor. An advance fires when one squad's worth of deaths has accumulated for a (level, faction) pair, and subtracts 1/advances of the picked smart's respawn cooldown. At 1, one advance clears the full cooldown (instant refill). At 4 (default), four advances of accumulated combat refill the smart. At 8, the refill is paced across eight advances. Higher values mean refills feel more earned by sustained combat.

Minimum cooldown that must remain on a smart after an advance applies, in game minutes. AlifeBalance never pushes the cooldown below this floor; the engine's own clock ages out the last leg naturally and fires the spawn from there. A smart already at or below this floor is skipped on the next advance (counter holds for next tick). Default 60 minutes (one game hour). Raise to leave more natural cooldown after every advance.

Place a green PDA map marker on every smart terrain that receives an advance. The marker lingers for 5 real-time minutes, then clears. Right-click any marker to teleport to that smart or show its stats. Independent of log level.
Debug and development tools. DEBUG level enables structured tracing of every advance to alifebalance.log. Has performance cost.
Controls log verbosity. ERROR: crashes only. WARN: anomalies. INFO: startup and config only. DEBUG: every death, advance, eligible-set compute, gate outcome, and tick summary.
Display total deaths, counted deaths (faction + level resolved), protected and trash-tier filtered, scan ticks, advances fired, and engine spawns observed.

Clear all death counters, eligibility and threshold caches, per-smart advance stats, and diagnostic counters. Existing cooldown advances already written to smart-terrain timestamps persist; the engine resolves them on its next try_respawn.
